Package io.vertigo.audit.trace

Class Trace

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.audit.trace.Trace
All Implemented Interfaces:
io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.DataObject, io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.Entity, Serializable
public final class Trace extends Object implements io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.Entity
This class defines the Auditing Trace for an Object.
Author:
xdurand
